title: Homilies on Lazarus: Wealth and Poverty
description: Chrysostom's devastating attack on the rich who ignore the poor lying at their gates.
introduction: Chrysostom's devastating attack on the rich who ignore the poor lying at their gates.

translation.text: Do you want to honor Christ's body? Then do not neglect him when he is naked. Do not honor him here in silk while outside he is perishing from cold.
